Spring Data Couchbase
  1. org.springframework.data.couchbase.core.support
  2. InScope

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.couchbase.core.support.InScope

Packages that use InScope
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.couchbase.core
This package contains the specific implementations and core classes for Spring Data Couchbase internals.

  • Uses of InScope in org.springframework.data.couchbase.core
